articles.title: Tuesday at T20 World Cup: New Zealand eye first win; Ireland run into England
articles.description: Southampton will host the double-header on Tuesday, with some rain expected in the evening

articles.title: Jordan Cox, Sonny Baker to debut for England in second New Zealand Test
articles.description: England announce four changes from Lord's Test - and could yet make a fifth

articles.title: 'Not ready to give up this' - Lyon's hunger drives long road back
articles.description: The offspinner has his sights on playing all of Australia's marathon Test schedule but, going by last season, it may not be entirely in his hands

articles.title: CA and states agree 'in principle' to BBL privatisation but hurdles remain
articles.description: Enabling states to make their own call on selling part or all of their BBL clubs has moved a step closer

articles.title: Holder completes heist for West Indies after Joseph picks up five
articles.description: Sherfane Rutherford, Shimron Hetmyer and Rovman Powell play their parts with the bat as West Indies overhaul Sri Lanka's 169 to take the series 2-1

articles.title: Connolly's 149 helps Australia survive Shoriful's six-for in one-wicket thriller
articles.description: Australia scraped home by one wicket to avoid a 3-0 series sweep

articles.title: Mandhana, Deepti, Ghosh star as India breeze past Pakistan
articles.description: Mandhana top-scored with 68 to lift India from 18 for 2 to 170, their highest in a T20 World Cup against Pakistan

articles.title: Campbelle repays the faith to stun defending champions
articles.description: Missing two key players West Indies needed someone to stand up and the No. 3 did so in dramatic style

articles.title: Kathryn Bryce's all-round heroics lead Scotland to maiden T20 World Cup win
articles.description: She followed up a 39-ball 60 with two wickets in a captain's performance

articles.title: Kane Williamson retires from international cricket
articles.description: New Zealand's record run-scorer opts out of completing ongoing Test series in England

articles.title: Broadcaster stops IND vs PAK women's cricket match midway to telecast FIFA World Cup, fans get furious
articles.description: India began their ICC Women’s T20 World Cup 2026 campaign in dominant fashion with a comprehensive 64-run victory over Pakistan at Edgbaston, Birmingham, on Sunday, June 14.

articles.title: ‘India is the biggest cricket market’ - Arun Dhumal backs BBL’s Chennai opener
articles.description: "See, India is the biggest cricket market. So definitely, Cricket Australia would want to capitalize on that. And we wish them all the best," said Dhumal.

articles.title: Hardik Pandya injury update: Will he play white-ball series against England?
articles.description: His setback has raised doubts about his involvement in the white-ball series away against England.

articles.title: ‘Team still lacks the depth’ - Ashwin concered over India’s Women's T20 World Cup prospects despite win over Pakistan
articles.description: Ashwin acknowledged India’s impressive performance against their arch-rivals but expressed doubts over the team’s ability to sustain success against stronger opposition.
